case_title: LIGHTS OUT INC VS. WOOD LLP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIGHTS OUT INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOOD LLP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WOOD LLP AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LIGHTS OUT INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BRATT BRYANT--CEO. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BEATRICE WOOD--OFFICE MANAGER. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTILMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT.
